title: REPO Paintings Data Pack
description: Adds paintings from R.E.P.O. to Minecraft
body:
This datapack adds paintings from R.E.P.O most of which are from the map «Museum of Human Art». It includes 101 paintings, which are presented in sizes:
- 1x1 — 3 paintings
- 1x2 — 22 paintings
- 2x1 — 34 paintings
- 2x2 — 8 paintings
- 2x3 — 3 paintings (new minecraft painting size)
- 2x4 — 6 paintings (new minecraft painting size)
- 4x2 — 18 paintings
- 3x3 — 4 paintings
- 4x4 — 3 paintings

In order for the paintings to be displayed correctly, you also need to download the [resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/repo-paintings-resource-pack) for this datapack.
